subject: Re: Tatyana's lease.
body:
send the money.. let tatianadeal with the rider

----- Original Message ----
From: "DKIESQ@aol.com" <DKIESQ@aol.com>
To: jeeproject@yahoo.com
Sent: Friday, February 9, 2007 12:58:59 PM
Subject: Tatyana's lease.



 

Received an e-mail from the Broker serving as the owner's agent for 
Tatyana's apartment.  The Broker gave me the amount of the advance for the 
electricity which is $1,500.  The Broker also asked again for a copy of the 
rider to be signed by Tatyana.  Please advise how to proceed.

 

Darren K. 
Indyke
Attorney-At-Law

4th Floor
New York, New
